title: ebay.com/sch/i.html?_nkw=iPhone+15+Pro+256GB&LH_Complete=1&LH_Sold=1
memory: The previous action was to extract structured data from the eBay sold listings page. I have successfully initiated the extraction to address all parts of the user request, including the result count, listing structure, prices, and visible UI elements.

extract.query:
Extract the following details from the eBay sold listings page:
1. Total result count and surrounding text.
2. Structure of individual listings (title, condition, price, shipping, date sold, seller info, etc.).
3. The exact format and location of SOLD PRICES.
4. The first 5 listings: Title and Price.
5. Visible filters, sorting options, and navigation elements.
6. Presence of popups or banners.
